name: Mathematics
shortDescription: Concept based math coaching for stronger fundamentals and score growth.
longDescription: Structured math learning covering arithmetic fluency, algebra, geometry, and advanced problem solving with weekly assessments.

name: Science
shortDescription: Integrated science mentoring with real world understanding.
longDescription: Balanced theory and application focused lessons in general science to build curiosity, conceptual clarity, and exam confidence.

name: English
shortDescription: Reading, writing, grammar, and communication improvement.
longDescription: Targeted English tutoring focused on comprehension, essay writing, vocabulary development, grammar precision, and spoken confidence.

name: Physics
shortDescription: Step by step physics tutoring for conceptual depth.
longDescription: Mentor guided physics sessions with numericals, derivations, and practical interpretation to build strong analytical reasoning.

name: Chemistry
shortDescription: Physical, organic, and inorganic chemistry coaching.
longDescription: Topic wise chemistry classes emphasizing formulas, reactions, mechanisms, and memory techniques for strong exam performance.

name: Biology
shortDescription: Visual and concept rich biology tutoring support.
longDescription: Detailed biology mentoring for diagrams, terminology, and process understanding to improve retention and written expression.

name: Commerce
shortDescription: Accounts, economics, and business studies guidance.
longDescription: Commerce specialists support students in accounting methods, economic reasoning, and business case based learning.

name: History
shortDescription: Chronology focused history classes with recall strategies.
longDescription: Narrative driven history lessons with timeline mapping and answer structuring techniques for better retention and writing quality.

name: Computer Science
longDescription: Computer science support across programming logic, algorithms, and practical project guidance with student friendly pacing.
